2606.12691.title: Two-Layer Linear Auto-Regressive Models Estimate Latent States
2606.12691.paper_summary: Auto-regressive models have emerged as powerful tools for sequential data, from language to video. Understanding how and why these models learn latent representations remains an open theoretical question. In this work, we demonstrate that when trained by empirical risk minimization on data from partially observed linear dynamical systems, two-layer linear auto-regressive models naturally learn to approximate Kalman filtering. In particular, we show that the learned hidden representation coincides, up to a similarity transformation, with the state estimates produced by the optimal (Kalman) filter, even though the model has no explicit knowledge of the underlying dynamics or state. The result follows from three main insights. First, we establish that the Kalman filter is well approximated by an auto-regressive model with bounded truncation error. Second, we show that despite non-convexity, the two-layer optimization landscape is benign, i.e., all stationary points are either strict saddles or global minima. Finally, as our main contributions, we provide finite-sample guarantees on prediction error, parameter estimation error, and latent state recovery. Numerical simulations support the theoretical results and demonstrate that the latent representations of auto-regressive models recover state estimates.
2606.12691.paper_summary_zh: 自回歸模型已成為處理序列數據（從語言到視頻）強大的工具。理解這些模型如何以及為什麼學習潛在表示仍然是一個未解的理論問題。在這項工作中，我們展示了當通過對部分觀察的線性動態系統的數據進行經驗風險最小化訓練時，兩層線性自回歸模型自然學會近似卡爾曼過濾器。特別是，我們顯示學習到的隱藏表示在相似性變換下與最優（卡爾曼）過濾器產生的狀態估計相吻合，即使該模型對潛在動態或狀態沒有明確的知識。這一結果源於三個主要見解。首先，我們確立了卡爾曼過濾器可以被有界截斷誤差的自回歸模型良好近似。其次，我們顯示儘管存在非凸性，兩層優化景觀是良性的，即所有靜態點要麼是嚴格鞍點，要麼是全局最小值。最後，作為我們的主要貢獻，我們提供了對預測誤差、參數估計誤差和潛在狀態恢復的有限樣本保證。數值模擬支持理論結果，並展示自回歸模型的潛在表示恢復狀態估計。
2606.12691.author: Yahya Sattar et.al.
2606.12691.authors: Yahya Sattar, Sunmook Choi, Leo Maynard-Zhang, Yassir Jedra, Maryam Fazel, Sarah Dean
